[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

Starting 10/21 (Mon), Scrimmage reward will be doubled!
Don't miss out on this opportunity to develop exclusive Weapons!

🗓️Period: 10/21 (Mon) 7:00 PM – 10/28 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)
